text:
The unseen Zoldyck Grandmother is the wife of Zeno Zoldyck, the mother of Silva Zoldyck, the paternal grandmother of the Zoldyck siblings, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 39 and an elite professional assassin herself. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 2, Chapter 13 

Appearance

She wears a long dress and appears to be the same height as Alluka Zoldyck. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 24 (2011) 

Background

At some point in her life, she became an assassin, met and married Zeno Zoldyck, had a son, Silva, and trained him as an assassin. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 5, Chapter 42 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

The tour guide mentions that the Zoldyck family has a set of grandparents when talking about the Zoldyck Family. 

Equipment

Zoldyck Personal Transmitter: The assassins of the Zoldyck Family can contact each other with a special transmitter to report the fulfillment of a murder contract. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 100 

Abilities & Powers

As the Zoldyck Grandmother was never seen, her abilities are largely unknown, though as an assassin from the Zoldyck Family, she is one of the best killers in the world, and possesses advanced assassination techniques. As a member of the Zoldycks, she has vast wealth and capable underlings at her disposal. Her family name alone is enough to scare those familiar with it. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 98 Since she is a Zoldyck assassin, she can also open the Testing Gates, although the number of doors she can open is unknown.

Assassination Skills: Silva Zoldyck mentioned that his parents trained him to be an assassin. 

Nen

She likely knows how to use Nen given of her position as a Zoldyck Family assassin.

Manga Appearances

Trivia

She is the only known Zoldyck who never made an appearance, not even mentioned after Chapter 42.
She was also mentioned once in the official databook. Hunter × Hunter Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (pg. 38) In the Hunter Association Official Issue: Hunter's Guide; Character & World Official Databook (page 38), it is stated that: "The identity of grandmother and younger brother Alluka is unknown." (祖母と弟アルカの素性は不明。, Sobo to otōto Aruka no sujō wa fumei.). 

Anime and Manga Differences

In Chapter 39, the grandmother is only indirectly mentioned by Coco Loo, talking about a set of grandparents, while in the 2011 anime adaptation, she was directly mentioned and her silhouette was showed between Maha and Killua.
